vulnerability.title: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive
vulnerability.description: Check that Chrony only has time sources configured with the server directive.
vulnerability.recommendation: Review and remediate: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive

triage_decision.reason: The fix involves reviewing and editing configuration files, which is a straightforward process with minimal risk of system breakage.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: Incorrect time source configuration; Potential misconfiguration leading to inaccurate time synchronization
